message: Harden upstream error handling, validate lookup input, shrink transaction scope
Add input cap and rate limiting, clean upstream errors, pin deps, add CI
Fix key leak in logs, junk filter false positives, and empty-envelope handling, add tests and CI
Fix springdoc version, add PATCH ownership and duplicate-email 400, harden rate limiting and admin bootstrap
Add auth and region checks to the receiver, timeouts and validation to the order app, tests for both
